raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Genoveva Islas is the founder and executive director of Cultiva La Salud, a nonprofit organization focused on creating health equity in the San Joaquin Valley.",
    "During the COVID-19 pandemic, Islas and her organization coordinated and conducted vaccination events in rural communities with limited access to health services.",
    "Islas is the president of the governing board for the Fresno Unified School District, which serves an ethnically diverse and economically disadvantaged student population.",
    "Islas's expertise has been recognized by prominent organizations, including her selection for the Culture of Health Leaders program supported by the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation.",
    "Islas served on the California Partnership for the San Joaquin Valley and on the Covered California Health Exchange Board, with appointments made by former Governor Jerry Brown.",
    "The Fresno-Merced Future of Food Innovation Coalition aims to merge technology into food production and improve the lives of farmworkers."
  ]
}
```
